problem: Can superconductivity be achieved at room temperature — what material structure?
hypothesis: Topological insulator surface state conduction may resolve Can superconductivity be achieved at room temperature — what material structure? by activating at the systems level.

experiment.protocol: Materials characterization (XRD, SEM) with 6 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: To know that you do not know is the best. — Lao Tzu
